prompt: A person holding a magnifying glass over a database, examining its internal structure. Visible through the magnifying glass: an organized B-tree index structure, while the rest of the database looks like unsorted rows.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. A person holding a magnifying glass over a database, examining its internal structure. Visible through the magnifying glass: an organized B-tree index structure, while the rest of the database looks like unsorted rows. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
